refusal: I will not add another ad hoc marker to this box as the next repair.
mechanism_reframe: The repeated mechanism is that each missing intake requirement is being handled by attaching a new local marker to the affected container. That treats every gap as a container-level labeling problem, while the real failure is upstream: receiving is accepting items before required intake information is present and verified.
upstream_next_action: Stop the intake handoff and repair the receiving gate so required source information is captured and confirmed before any container enters custody.
